description.overview: A rare Hungarian herding breed, the Mudi is extremely versatile and intelligent. They excel at many dog sports and make loyal companions.
description.temperament: Known for being intelligent, alert, versatile.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their wavy or curly coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A rare Hungarian herding breed, the Mudi is extremely versatile and intelligent. They excel at many dog sports and make loyal companions.
